contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Edgar OAuth post-mortem: nginx $host heredoc trap fixed + documented
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/120
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed and resolved the 4-hour Edgar OAuth outage on edgar.truesight.me.
  
  ## Symptom
  After PR #1054 (OmniAuth.config.full_host) shipped, Google's OAuth consent screen
  worked, but every Devise redirect endpoint (/users/sign_in, /users/sign_out,
  post-OAuth callback, /companies/:slug) returned 502 Bad Gateway. Static landing
  page kept working.
  
  ## Root cause (compound bug)
  1. Yesterday's migration to TRUESIGHT_DAO_AUTOPILOT created the new nginx
     config via a single-quoted bash heredoc that contained backslash-escaped
     variables — \$host, \$request_uri, etc. Single-quoted heredocs do NOT
     expand variables, so the backslashes were preserved verbatim in the file.
     nginx then parsed \$host as literal '\' + variable $host, and forwarded
     'Host: \edgar.truesight.me' upstream. Rails read that as the host, every
     redirect_to became 'https://\edgar.truesight.me/...', webrick raised
     URI::InvalidURIError, nginx returned 502.
  2. Compounding bug: /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/edgar.conf was a regular file
     (not a symlink to sites-available/), so the first scp+install fix to
     sites-available/ did not propagate. Re-symlinked sites-enabled, reloaded
     nginx, verified clean Host header via tcpdump, confirmed all redirect
     endpoints return clean 302s.
  
  ## Fix shipped
  - TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context PR #120: Documents both the heredoc trap
    and the sites-enabled symlink check in NOTES_sentiment_importer.md, plus
    updates the topology table to reflect the post-migration TRUESIGHT_DAO_AUTOPILOT
    hosts (seni_ror_new 3.90.179.151 / seni_sk_new 54.163.216.235).
  - Live nginx config on seni_ror_new restored to the clean version
    (proxy_set_header Host $host; with no backslash) and sites-enabled
    re-linked to sites-available.
  
  ## Verification
  curl -sI https://edgar.truesight.me/companies/KWR
    -> HTTP/2 302
    -> Location: https://edgar.truesight.me/users/sign_in   (no backslash)
  
  journalctl -u seni_ror: no more URI::InvalidURIError after the fix.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
